overall.description: Third-person gameplay from Red Dead Redemption 2 depicting a cowboy leading his horse through a snowy mountain pass at night, illuminated only by moonlight and a handheld lantern. The character eventually mounts the horse and rides deeper into the snow-covered wilderness.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered mountain trail between rocky slopes

agents.ego_description: leading the horse by the reins while walking uphill through deep snow, holding a lantern to illuminate the path ahead

notable_agents.action: horse walking beside the character, occasionally shaking its head and mane

entered.detail: narrow path through deep snow with visible footprints and disturbed powder
steep snow-covered mountainside rising sharply to the right of the path
snow-laden pine bushes and small trees lining the left side of the trail
dark silhouetted mountain peaks visible against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks beside his horse through a narrow mountain pass blanketed in deep snow. The lantern casts a warm glow on the snow-covered trail while dark mountain slopes rise on either side. Sparse vegetation lines the path as they ascend toward distant peaks visible in the moonlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snow field on mountain slope

events.description: character mounts the horse and transitions from walking to riding uphill

agents.ego_description: riding the horse through deep snow, guiding it up the open mountain slope

notable_agents.action: horse trotting uphill through deep snow, kicking up white snow particles

entered.detail: expansive snow-covered mountain basin opening up ahead

segments.scene_description: The character mounts the horse and begins riding through the deep snow. The terrain opens into a wide snow field as they ascend, with the lantern light revealing the path ahead. The horse kicks up snow as it moves, and the surrounding vegetation falls behind, leaving open white slopes extending toward the distant mountain peaks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow, moonlit mountain pass that gradually opens into a vast, snow-covered wilderness. It begins with the character walking beside his horse, where a handheld lantern casts a warm glow across a deep snow trail flanked by dark, rising slopes and sparse vegetation. As the character mounts the horse and begins to ride, the restrictive mountain walls recede and the terrain expands into a wide, open snow field. The scene then shifts as the horse kicks up fresh powder while ascending, leaving the vegetation behind in favor of endless white slopes. Finally, the camera tracks the pair as they move deeper into the open landscape toward distant, moonlit peaks.
